rule_metadata.name: metasploit
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'metasploit' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule metasploit
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'metasploit' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "metasploit"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\s\-c\s\'import\spty\;pty\.spawn\(\\"\/bin\/sh/
		$string2 = " install metasploit-framework" nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = " LPORT=4444" nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = " metasploit-omnibus-builder " nocase ascii wide
		$string5 = " msfdb run  " nocase ascii wide
		$string6 = /\smsfremove\.ps1/ nocase ascii wide
		$string7 = /\smsfupdate\.ps1/ nocase ascii wide
		$string8 = /\s\-\-payload\s.{0,100}\s\-\-platform\swindows/ nocase ascii wide
		$string9 = /\s\-q\s\-r\skarma\.rc_\.txt/ nocase ascii wide
		$string10 = " rapid7/msf-ubuntu" nocase ascii wide
		$string11 = /\.\/msfinstall/
		$string12 = /\/.{0,100}_priv_esc\./ nocase ascii wide
		$string13 = /\/.{0,100}SandboxEscapes\// nocase ascii wide
		$string14 = "/admin/smb/ms17_010_command" nocase ascii wide
